domain: SaaS for UK short-term let hosts

cards.default: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden
cards.interactive: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:shadow-md hover:border-slate-300 transition-all cursor-pointer

buttons.primary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-blue-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none
buttons.secondary: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none
buttons.danger: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-red-600 px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-white hover:bg-red-700 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-red-500 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none
buttons.ghost: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-100 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:ring-offset-2 transition-colors

inputs.default: flex h-10 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm placeholder:text-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.success: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-emerald-50 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-emerald-700 ring-1 ring-inset ring-emerald-600/20
badges.warning: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-amber-50 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-amber-700 ring-1 ring-inset ring-amber-600/20
badges.error: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-red-50 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-red-700 ring-1 ring-inset ring-red-600/10
badges.neutral: inline-flex items-center rounded-full bg-slate-50 px-2 py-1 text-xs font-medium text-slate-600 ring-1 ring-inset ring-slate-500/10

images.description: Modern London apartment interior. Use as hero background image with a light overlay, or in the benefits section.
Bright minimalist interior. Use for auth screen background or secondary feature sections.
Soft abstract blue gradient. Use sparingly as a subtle background accent for CTA sections or empty states.

instructions_to_main_agent: TECH STACK: React, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn UI primitives, Lucide React (for icons). Use .js or .jsx files only, NOT .tsx.
STYLING: Strictly enforce the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' B2B SaaS look. Minimal gradients. Rely on generous padding, stark white backgrounds, and clear 1px borders.
NAVIGATION: Create a responsive top navigation for the landing page. For the app shell, build a top header and a left sidebar layout (w-64 on desktop).
MARKETING PAGE: Must include Hero ('Short-let compliance, handled.'), Benefits, Pricing preview, FAQ, and Final CTA. Use generous spacing (py-24).

APP SHELL: Build Dashboard, Properties, Compliance, Tasks, Billing, Settings placeholders. Dashboard must display summary cards (Total Properties, Upcoming Expiries, Overdue Items, Missing Documents, Tasks Due).
DASHBOARD CARDS: Use bento-grid / Control Room grid layout. Must prominently display status colors (red for overdue, amber for missing/expiring) to alert the user immediately.
AUTHENTICATION: Build email/password signup, login, logout, and a mocked password reset page. Protect app routes so only logged-in users see the dashboard.
DATABASE: Provide a schema foundation (e.g., Prisma or generic SQL structure) for Users, Subscriptions, Properties, Compliance_Records, Tasks, Notifications, Uploaded_Files.
TESTING: Add `data-testid` attributes to all buttons, links, form inputs, and key UI elements (e.g., `data-testid="start-trial-btn"`).
EMPTY STATES: Ensure the dashboard and placeholder pages have strong empty states indicating what to do next (e.g., 'No properties added yet', 'Add your first property').
